intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/7. 75% FTP, Seated. 15:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 54 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/7. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 115% for 2:00. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 2:00 at 115%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/7. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 2:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 7.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/7. 3:00 at 112%. Cadence: 95-100 rpm. Seated. 5 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/7. You're building something real here. 5 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/7. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into session. 112% at 95-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/7. You're 36% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/7. 110% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/7. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/7. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 3/7. 110%, 85-90 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 42% done. 0 intervals left. 36 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 42% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 47% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 108% for 5:00. Next up: 5:00 recovery, then 4min at 110%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 47% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 47% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. 108% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 14min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 38 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 2 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5: 110% FTP. You're 43 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Deep into it: 62% done. This is where you separate from your past self. Dig deeper.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 2 intervals left. 22 total minutes. Your lungs are burning. That's adaptation.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 68% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 47 minutes of work done. 18 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 18 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/7. You're 73% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% complete. 112% for 3:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 90-100 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 15 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 6/7. 112% FTP × 3:00. Seated. 1 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 54 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 78% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 78% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 115-115% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Seated. Finish strong, then 10 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 2:00 at 115%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. 2:00 at 115%. Then 10 minutes to contemplate your life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 115% × 2:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 23min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 59 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
